utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Is it better than the other salmon mousse ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I do not know . We are talking about whipped fish , Monica . I am just happy I am keeping it down , you know ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: My God ! What happened to you ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Eight and a half hours of aptitude tests , intelligence tests , personality tests ... and what do I learn ?

emotion_cause.span: 7_" You are ideally suited for a career in data processing for a large multinational corporation . "
